response.text:
Exact verification is incomplete for the harmonics type selector.

ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Cannot emit applyable steps because the exact verified enum/value for POWer:POWer<x>:TYPe needed to switch a new POWER<x> badge from its default Switching Loss type to Harmonics was not retrieved.","findings":["Verified: POWer:ADDNew \"POWER<x>\" creates a power measurement badge, but it defaults to Switching Loss.","Verified: harmonics configuration commands exist for an existing harmonics power measurement, including POWer:POWer<x>:HARMONICS:HSOURce, :ISOURce, :VSOURce, :STANDard, :CLASs, :HORDer, :POWERRating, :RCURRent, and :IPOWer.","Verified: harmonics result queries exist, including POWer:POWer<x>:RESUlts:CURRentacq:FREQUENCY? \"harmonics\", :IRMS? \"harmonics\", :VRMS? \"harmonics\", :THDF? \"harmonics\", and :THDR? \"harmonics\".","Missing source-of-truth detail: the exact allowed TYPe argument value for Harmonics on POWer:POWer<x>:TYPe was not retrieved, so the flow cannot be made fully applyable without guessing."],"suggestedFixes":["Retrieve the full command record for POWer:POWer<x>:TYPe including validValues/examples for the Harmonics measurement type, then build the flow from POWer:ADDNew through harmonics source/config/result queries."],"actions":[]}

actionsJson.summary: Cannot emit applyable steps because the exact verified enum/value for POWer:POWer<x>:TYPe needed to switch a new POWER<x> badge from its default Switching Loss type to Harmonics was not retrieved.
findings: Verified: POWer:ADDNew "POWER<x>" creates a power measurement badge, but it defaults to Switching Loss.

Verified: harmonics configuration commands exist for an existing harmonics power measurement, including POWer:POWer<x>:HARMONICS:HSOURce, :ISOURce, :VSOURce, :STANDard, :CLASs, :HORDer, :POWERRating, :RCURRent, and :IPOWer.
Verified: harmonics result queries exist, including POWer:POWer<x>:RESUlts:CURRentacq:FREQUENCY? "harmonics", :IRMS? "harmonics", :VRMS? "harmonics", :THDF? "harmonics", and :THDR? "harmonics".
Missing source-of-truth detail: the exact allowed TYPe argument value for Harmonics on POWer:POWer<x>:TYPe was not retrieved, so the flow cannot be made fully applyable without guessing.
suggestedFixes: Retrieve the full command record for POWer:POWer<x>:TYPe including validValues/examples for the Harmonics measurement type, then build the flow from POWer:ADDNew through harmonics source/config/result queries.
